tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests package

Submodules

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_allocate_biomass(light, ext, conv, gfact, rfrac)

integration check to check that biomass gets allocated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_calc_above_ground_biomass(frac, bmass)

ensure that above ground biomass is correctly calculated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_calc_below_ground_biomass(frac, bmass)

ensure that below ground biomass is correctly calculated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_calc_biomass_accumulation(factor, max_growth)

ensure that biomass growth is correctly calculated by calc_biomass_accumulation()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_calc_intercepted_radiation(rad, ext, lai)

ensure that intercepted radiation is correctly calculated by calc_intercepted_radiation()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_biomass_allocation.test_calc_max_accumulation(rad, eff, expected)

test that maximum biomass accumulation is properly calculated with calc_max_accumulation()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop.test_grow_crop(in_growing_system: bool) → None

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_given_harvest_index_property(usr_index, expect)

test the class knows if harvest index override is specified

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_heat_fraction(accumulated: float, potential: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the heat fraction is correctly calculated based on the heat units.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_in_growing_season_property(mature: bool, dormant: bool, alive: bool, growing: bool, expected: bool) → None

Tests that crop’s growth status is correctly determined.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_is_mature_property(frac: float, expect: bool) → None

check that the is_mature property is properly assigning maturity by heat fraction

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_is_perennial(plant_type: PlantCategory) → None

Tests that is_perennial() correctly determines whether a plant is a perennial

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_manual_custom_crop_data()

checks (and demonstrates) the alternate way of customizing a crop

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_tree_dormancy_loss() → None

A separate test to check the dormancy loss for future use of TREE

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_data.test_water_canopy_storage_capacity(max_capacity: float, lai: float, max_lai: float) → None

Tests that the current storage capacity of the canopy is correctly calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_adjust_harvest_index(idx: float, min_index: float, deficiency: float)

ensure that actual harvest index is properly calculated by calc_actual_harvest_index()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_check_harvest_schedule(heat_sched: bool, heat_frac: float, harv_day: int, harv_yr: int, this_day: int, this_yr: int)

ensure that is_harvest_day is correctly set

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_cut_crop(efficiency: float, harvest: float, override: bool, should_fail: bool)

Ensure that the crop cutting routines are properly executed and that errors are raised properly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_determine_biomass_cut_from_whole_plant(bmass: float, harv_ind: float)

ensure that yield is correctly calculated by determine_yield_from_total_biomass()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_determine_harvest_index(harvest, heat_frac, water_def)

ensure that the harvest index is properly evaluated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_determine_potential_harvest_index(heatfrac: float, optimal_index: float)

ensure that the potential harvest index is properly calculated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_dry_down()
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_kill()

tests that a crop is properly killed by kill()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_manage_harvest(harvest_op: HarvestOperation, field_name: str, field_size: float, year: int, day: int, soil_data: SoilData, killed: bool) → None

ensure that crops are harvested properly, dependent on their operation specs

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_recalculate_biomass_distribution(roots_harvested: bool, cut_biomass: float, biomass: float, expected_surface_biomass: float, expected_root_biomass: float, expected_root_fraction: float) → None

Tests that biomass is correctly redistributed after a harvest event.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_record_yield(field_name: str, field_size: float, species: str, year: int, day: int, mass: float, dry_mass: float, nitrogen: float, phosphorus: float) → None

Tests that harvest yields are correctly recorded to the OutputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_management.test_transfer_residue(root_biomass: float, residue: float, nitrogen: float, killed: bool, expected_root_depth: float, expected_surface_residue: float, expected_root_residue: float) → None

Tests that residue and associated nutrients from harvests and not collected are properly transferred to the soil.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory.test_crop_species_enum(species, expected)

ensure that CropSpecies correctly enumerates the accepted species names

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory.test_factory_alterations(species, vars_dict)

check that the factory properly creates ‘altered’ crop species data objects

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory.test_factory_errors(species, bad_attr)

check that specifying invalid attributes appropriately raises an error

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory.test_invalid_crop_species_enum(invalid_species)

ensure that CropSpecies correctly raises an error when invalid species names are given.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_crop_species_data_factory.test_species_factory_defaults()

Ensure that each species come shipped with their factory-default settings. This is a check of the CropSpeciesDataFactory.create_species_data() method.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_dormancy module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_dormancy.test_find_dormancy_threshold(latitude: float) → None

Tests that the dormancy threshold is correctly calculated based on the latitude.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_dormancy.test_find_threshold_daylength(min_daylength: float, dormancy_threshold: float) → None

Tests that the dormancy threshold daylength is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_dormancy.test_go_into_dormancy(biomass: float, residue: float, lai: float, min_lai: float, plant_type: PlantCategory, loss_frac: float, is_dormant: bool) → None

Tests that crops are correctly set to be dormant, and when set to being dormant lose the correct amount of biomass and have their leaf area index reset to the correct value.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints.test_calc_growth_factor(w_stress, t_stress, n_stress, p_stress)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints.test_calc_nutrient_stress(act, opt)

ensure that nitrogen scaling factor is correctly calculated by calc_nitrogen_stress_scaling_factor().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints.test_calc_temperature_stress(air, mini, opt)

ensure temperature stress is correctly calculated with calc_temperature_stress()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints.test_calc_water_stress(uptake, trans)

ensure water stress is correctly calculated with calc_water_stress()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_growth_constraints.test_constrain_growth(trans, temp)

integration test: check that the growth factor is properly determined

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_absorb_heat_units(mean, mint, maxt, use_heat_unit_temp)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_accumulate_heat_units(temp, mocker: MockerFixture)

check that accumulate_heat_units() calls the right functions

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_add_heat_units(start, new)

check that heat units are accumulated properly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_assign_new_heat_units(use_alt, temp)

check that assign_new_heat_units properly assigns heat units

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_check_absorb_heat_for_input_errors(use_alt, meant, min_t, max_t)

check that errors are thrown when improper input is given, using _check_absorb_heat_for_input_errors

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_determine_maximum_heat_unit_temperature(air, plant)

check that maximum heat units are properly calculated by calc_maximum_heat_unit_temperature()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_determine_minimum_heat_unit_temperature(air, plant)

check that minimum heat units are properly calculated by calc_minimum_heat_unit_temperature()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_heat_units.test_determine_new_heat_units(temp, min_t)

check that new heat units are correctly calculated by calc_new_heat_units()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_calc_shape_log(heatfrac, areafrac)

ensure that log terms are calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_canopy_height(max_can_height, opt_leaf_area_frac)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_lai_shapes(heatfrac1, heatfrac2, areafrac1, areafrac2)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_max_leaf_area_change(frac, prev_frac, max_lai, prev_lai)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_optimal_leaf_area_fraction(heatfrac, s1, s2)

ensure that optimal leaf area fraction is properly calculated by calc_optimal_leaf_area_fraction()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_senescent_leaf_area_index(heatfrac, senheatfrac, optareafrac)

heatfrac is fr_PHU senheatfrac is fr_PHU,sen optareafrac is LAI_mx

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_calc_shape_log(heatfrac, areafrac)

ensure that the errors are thrown for inappropriate input to calc_shape_log()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_canopy_height(max_can_height, opt_leaf_area_frac)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_lai_shape(heatfrac1, heatfrac2, areafrac1, areafrac2)

check that invalid input to test_error_calc_shape_parameters throws errors

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_senescent_leaf_area_index(heatfrac, senheatfrac, optareafrac)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_grow_canopy(heatfrac: float, previous_leaf_area_index: int, previous_optimal_leaf_area_fraction: int) → None

Integration test for leaf area processes via grow_canopy().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_access_layers(deepest, layers)

check that soil layers are accessed correctly with access_layers()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_deepest_accessible_layer(root, depths, expect)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_extracted_resource(requested, available)

ensure that extracted resource is correctly calculated by determine_extracted_resource()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_fixation_stage_factor(heatfrac, expect)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_fixed_nitrogen(demand, stage, water, nitrate, expect)

check that nitrogen values are calculated as expected with determine_fixed_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_layer_extracted_resource(reqs, srcs)

ensure that extracted nitrogen is correctly calculated for each layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_layer_nitrogen_demands(pots, avails)

test that nitrogen demand is correctly calculated for each layer by determine_layer_nitrogen_demand()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_layer_nitrogen_uptake(demand, potential, nitrate)

test that actual nitrogen uptake from each layer is properly calculated by determine_layer_nitrogen_uptake()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_layer_nitrogen_uptake_potential(bounds, demand, root_depth, ndistro)

ensure potential nitrogen uptake is calculated correctly for each soil layer with determine_layer_nitrogen_potential()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_nitrate_factor(nitrates, expect)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_nitrogen_shape_parameters(halfheat: float, heatfrac: float, emerge: float, half: float, near: float, mature: float, should_fail: bool) → None

check that the shape parameters are correctly calculated by determine_nshapes() and that errors were raised correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_nitrogen_uptake_to_depth(demand, depth, root_depth, ndistro)

check that nitrogen uptake is correctly calculated by determine_surface_nitrogen_uptake()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_optimal_nitrogen(nfrac, biomass)

test that optimal nitrogen is correctly calculated by determine_optimal_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_optimal_nitrogen_fraction(heatfrac, emerge, mature, shape1, shape2)

ensure that nitrogen fraction is correctly calculated by determine_optimal_nitrogen_fraction()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_potential_nitrogen_uptake(optimal, previous, mature, max_growth)

test that potential nitrogen uptake is correctly calculated by determine_max_nitrogen_uptake()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_shape_log(heatfrac, current, mature, emergence)

check that determine_shape_log() calculates correct output

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_determine_stored_nitrogen(prev, new, fix)

test the stored nitrogen is properly calculated by determine_stored_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_error_determine_deepest_accessible_layer(root, depths)

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_error_determine_nitrogen_uptake_to_depth(demand, depth, root_depth, ndistro)

“check that errors are appropriately thrown for determine_surface_nitrogen_uptake()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_error_determine_shape_log(heatfrac, current, mature, emergence)

check that determine_shape_log() throws errors when appropriate

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_extend_nitrate_uptakes_to_full_profile(missed, uptakes, expect)

check that the correct number of zeros are padded to uptakes by extend_nitrate_uptakes_to_full_profile()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_extract_nitrogen_from_soil_layers(uptakes, nitrates)

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_fix_nitrogen(uptake, demand, water, fixfact, nitrate)

check that fixed nitrogen is properly calculated by fix_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_incorporate_nitrogen(nitrates: list[float], depths: list[float], water_factor: float, gate: bool) → None

Tests that nitrogen uptake and fixation is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_shift_nitrogen_time(old, new)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_tally_total_nitrogen_uptake(uptakes)

check that total nitrogen is correctly calculated by tally_total_nitrogen_uptake()

check that try_fixation calls its sub-functions if fixation occurs

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_incorporation.test_update_fixation_attributes(mocker: MockerFixture)

“check that update_nitrate_attributes calls both its sub-functions

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_access_layers(deepest, layers)

check that soil layers are accessed correctly with access_layers()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_cd_phosphorus_from_soil_layers(uptakes, phosphates)

check that layer_nitrates were correctly updated by extract_phosphorus_from_soil_layers

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_extend_phosphate_uptakes_to_full_profile(layers: int) → None

Checks that the helper method extend_phosphate_uptakes_to_full_profile() does correctly updates the list to the right length

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_incorporate_phosphorus(phosphates: list[float], depths: list[float], gate: bool) → None

Check that incorporate_phosphorus() correctly called functions and variables were updated as expected.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_phosphorus_determine_deepest_accessible_soil_layer(root_depth, depths, expect)

ensure that layers are partitioned correctly by determine_deepest_accessible_soil_layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_shift_phosphorus_time(old, new)

ensure shift_phosphorus_time correctly copies current phosphorus value to previous_phosphorus

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_tally_total_phosphorus_uptake(uptakes)

check that total phosphorus was correctly summed by tally_total_phosphorus_uptake

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_phosphorus_incorporation.test_uptake_phosphorus(phosphates, depths)

check that uptake_phosphorus() correctly called functions and variables were updated as expected

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_root_development module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_root_development.test_determine_root_depth(maxd, heatfrac)

check that root depths are properly calculated by determine_root_depths()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_root_development.test_determine_root_fraction(heatfrac, expect)

check that root fraction is properly calculated by determine_root_fraction()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_root_development.test_develop_roots(maxd: int, heatfrac: float) → None

Integration test for main root development function develop_roots().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_cycle_water(mocker: MockerFixture, evap: float, trans: float, et_max: float) → None

Integration test to check that water cycling routines are properly carried out.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_determine_evapotranspiration(evap, trans)

ensure that evapotranspiration is correclty calculated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_determine_maximum_transpiration(leaf_area_index, potential_evapotrans_adj)
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_determine_water_deficiency(et, max_et)

ensure that water deficiency is properly calculated

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_evaporate_from_canopy(evapotranspirative_demand: float, canopy_water: float, expected_evaporation: float, expected_water: float) → None

Tests that the correct amount of water is evaporated from crop canopy and the correct amount of evaporation was returned.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_dynamics.test_set_maximum_transpiration(leaf_area_index: float, potential_evapotranspiration_adjusted: float) → None

Tests that the maximum transpiration of a crop is set correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_adjust_water_uptakes(potential_uptakes: List[float], unmet_demands: List[float], uptake_compensation: float, should_fail: bool, expected: List[float]) → None

Tests that the adjusted water uptakes are calculated correctly when there’s no error in input

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_correct_layer_for_efficiency(pot, avail, cap)

checks that layer efficiency is corrected properly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_determine_actual_layer_uptake(pot, avail, wilt)

checks that layer uptake is correct

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_determine_max_water_uptake_to_depth(root_depth: float, depth: float, max_plant_transpiration: float, water_distribution_parameter: float) → None

Tests that the stratified max water uptake to depth are calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_extract_water_from_soil(layers, uptakes, should_fail: bool) → None

This method only tests for edge cases, other parts of the method already have coverage

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_find_stratified_max_water_uptakes(root_depth: float, max_transpiration: float, water_distro_parameter: float, upper_depths: List[float], lower_depths: List[float], should_fail: bool, expected: List[float]) → None

Tests that the stratified max water uptakes are calculated correctly when there’s no error in input

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_reduce_efficiency_of_uptake(potential_uptakes: List[float], water_availabilities: List[float], available_capacities: List[float], should_fail: bool) → None

Tests that the reduced efficiency of uptake is calculated correctly when there’s no error in input

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_take_up_water(potential_uptakes: List[float], water_availabilities: List[float], wilting_points: List[float], should_fail: bool) → None

Tests that the the correct output _take_up_water of were calculated when there’s no error in input

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_water_uptake.test_uptake_water(max_trans)

ensure that uptake_water can run without error
